options.name: -add_via
options.description: {via_name1 via_name2} Append the list of via or via rule generate name

options.name: -exclude_backside_via
options.description: do not include backside via in the rule

options.name: -generate_via
options.description: auto-generate vias with the generateVias command. If getGenerateViaMode -auto is true, then this is done by default even if -generate_via is not given.

options.name: -min_cut
options.description: {layer1[:layer2] min_cut} the min cut limit for via layers

options.name: -spacing_multiplier
options.description: {layer1[:layer2] spacing_multiplier} spacing multiplier for routing layers

options.name: -use_via_cut_class
options.description: {layer cut_class [nr_row nr_col]} ... The layer and cut_class list

options.name: -via
options.description: {via_name1 via_name2} Reset and add the list of via or via rule generate name

options.name: -width_multiplier
options.description: {layer1[:layer2] width_multiplier} width multiplier for routing layers
